mapper.sql:
deleted = 0 AND published = 1
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notices WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND deleted = 0 AND published = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notices
deleted = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND published = #{published}
SELECT * FROM notices WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices ( admin_id, title, content, pinned, published ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{pinned}, #{published} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, pinned = #{pinned}, published = #{published}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE notices SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND deleted = 0
